rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HARRY B. LAHEY
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, subject to revision of statutory fees for Counsel as follows: on waiver of account, when no receipt schedule is filed, the statutory fee is based solely on the inventory value. This change resulted in a statutory fee of $269.51, plus extraordinary fees of $930, for total fees of $1,199.51.
